title: Underdog Fantasy
html:
Stub. The peer-prop sports-betting app Yahir cites as the spark for the WagerWrld Jan 2024 memo — "on Underdog, where it's very simple and intuitive to place over-under on players, and the more you stack the higher the multiple payout potential." Emilio and his friend group were the observed users that surfaced the "betting with the boys" product gap.
